name: manual_97e231
claim: Tempire UI rule: always add the slim-scrollbar CSS class to any scrollable element (overflow-auto or overflow-scroll). The class is defined globally in globals.css and renders a 4px pill-shaped zinc-700 scrollbar with transparent track, for both WebKit and Firefox. Never use the browser default scrollbar.

decisions.notes: Victor wants a premium slim scrollbar on all scrollable areas. The class is already globally defined so no additional CSS is needed — just add slim-scrollbar to the element's className.

rationale: Victor wants a premium slim scrollbar on all scrollable areas. The class is already globally defined so no additional CSS is needed — just add slim-scrollbar to the element's className.
